diagrams.title: Abstract Class Hierarchy
diagrams.description: Shows the relationship between abstract base class and concrete derived classes
diagrams.purpose: Visualize IS-A relationship and how abstract classes define interfaces

diagrams.title: Virtual Function Call Mechanism
diagrams.description: Demonstrates how vtable enables runtime polymorphism
diagrams.purpose: Understand how function calls are resolved at runtime through vtable lookup

diagrams.title: Object Slicing Demonstration
diagrams.description: Shows what happens when derived object is assigned to base object by value
diagrams.purpose: Visualize why object slicing destroys polymorphism and how to prevent it
